title: Forged Nations Modpack
description:
A client-side companion pack specifically curated to enhance the visual, auditory, and performance experience for Forged Nations.

Not Required!!!
body:
This is the official companion modpack for the Forged Nations (Minecraft 1.21.4 Fabric). As it exclusively contains client-side mods focused on performance, visuals, and quality-of-life features, it is entirely optional and not required to join the server. Feel free to use it for the recommended visual and utility experience, or connect with your preferred client setup.

The Forged Nations Modpack enhances your personal gameplay with smooth performance via Sodium and enriches the world visually with upgrades like Visuality, Continuity, Wavey Capes, and enhanced animations (Better Animations Collection, Not Enough Animations).

Key client-side utilities like Roughly Enough Items (REI), Jade, Xaero's Minimap, and AppleSkin provide crucial information and navigation tools directly on your screen. Builders will appreciate Litematica and its printer addon for planning designs. The pack also improves the user interface with features like Mod Menu, Mouse Tweaks, and enhanced chat. (Note: Any content mods like Slimefun listed are included for client-side integration, like recipe viewing or visual tweaks).
